_comment: Current model outputs (v7-sprint10 after Oborovo OpEx calibration). Source: ProjectInputs.create_default_oborovo() + cached_run_waterfall_v3. NOT Excel-verified — model calibration in progress.

metadata.note: Updated after Sprint 10 Task 10-0: Oborovo OpEx calibrated from 1,339 to 1,998 kEUR per Excel CF sheet. This fixed Y1 OpEx but moved equity_irr from 10.79% to 10.06% and project_irr from 8.62% to 7.44%.

note: This fixture captures the CURRENT state of the model. Excel-verified targets are in oborovo_golden.json. Calibration still in progress.

deviations.summary: Sprint 10 Task 10-0: Oborovo OpEx fixed (1,339 → 1,998 kEUR). Project IRR moved from +0.66pp to -0.52pp (now below target). Equity IRR moved from +0.19pp to -0.54pp (now below target). Debt unchanged at 43,614 kEUR. TUHO revenue calibration still needed (Task 10-1).
